nls.ext.description: Custom editor for PNG / JPG / WEBP / GIF / BMP / AVIF / HEIC / SVG / ICO with EXIF metadata, camera/lens summary, GPS-to-Google-Maps, PNG iTXt/tEXt/zTXt text chunks (Korean prompts supported), and full raw EXIF dump.
nls.config.defaultTab: Which tab the image viewer opens on first.
nls.config.defaultTab.overview: Overview — file info, camera summary, GPS.
nls.config.defaultTab.exif: EXIF / Segments — every IFD0/EXIF/IPTC/XMP/ICC/IHDR section as a card.
nls.config.defaultTab.pngText: PNG Text — tEXt / zTXt / iTXt chunks (AI prompts live here).
nls.config.defaultTab.raw: Raw JSON — the full metadata dump.
nls.config.rawJsonExpanded: Open the Raw JSON pane expanded by default. Off = collapsed under a Show button.
nls.config.pngTextShowAiPromptFormatted: Preserve line breaks for AI-prompt keywords (parameters, prompt, negative_prompt, workflow, comment) so Stable Diffusion / ComfyUI metadata stays readable.

runtime.Failed to load image. The format may not: Failed to load image. The format may not be supported by VSCode's webview renderer (e.g., HEIC).
No EXIF metadata in this file.
runtime.No PNG text chunks (tEXt / zTXt / iTXt): No PNG text chunks (tEXt / zTXt / iTXt) in this file.
runtime.Text was zlib-compressed inside the chun: Text was zlib-compressed inside the chunk.
runtime.iTXt — UTF-8 text chunk. Supports any la: iTXt — UTF-8 text chunk. Supports any language (Korean, emoji, full Unicode).
runtime.tEXt — ASCII / Latin-1 only. Non-ASCII c: tEXt — ASCII / Latin-1 only. Non-ASCII characters may be garbled.
runtime.zTXt — zlib-compressed tEXt. ASCII / Lat: zTXt — zlib-compressed tEXt. ASCII / Latin-1 only.
